description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular column with a sleek, modern design, standing on a wooden platform. Its exterior is covered in dark, glossy panels featuring a large printed advertisement for 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' with dynamic graphics of makeup brushes and powder bursts. The kiosk has no visible windows or doors, giving it a monolithic appearance, and its corners are sharply defined with metallic trim along the top edges. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal and composite panels, likely supported by an internal frame. The surface finish is smooth and reflective, contributing to its contemporary, eye-catching look. The kiosk is designed for promotional or informational purposes in urban environments, such as malls or exhibition spaces.
description: A tall, modern rectangular kiosk with glossy black advertising panels and metallic trim, standing on a wooden platform. The structure is monolithic, with bold graphics and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main advertising panel with 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text and a person gesturing towards the kiosk.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the kiosk and the continuation of the graphic design, with the person standing beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back panel, which is similar in design to the front, and the person facing away from the kiosk.
description_view_3: Oblique view highlights the kiosk's sharp corners and metallic trim, with the person partially obscured behind the structure.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into side panels, featuring 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text and makeup graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with metallic trim, no overhangs or decorative elements.
